title: D-COMMS-2 — Promote RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 working-model -> automated
description: Promote RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 tier from working-model to automated. D-COMMS-1 (merge SHA f6bee1b93ec0a64c5e1ccca16184409840bc1056, PR #84) is the evidenceClass: the slack-broadcast.yml GitHub Actions workflow auto-publishes PR open/merge events and FU register changes to the #luhtech-agents-comms Slack channel, which acts as the canonical discovery substrate the rule requires. Channel currently broadcasting six events from today's deliverables; bot live in channel; workflow self-evidencing. Promotion via canonical mechanism exercised three times today (FU-D-2, FU-D-3, FU-D-4): version bump 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0, append promotion transition with evidenceClass, flip tierState.activeTier to automated, append closure note to notes field.

outputs.description: Promote RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 via canonical mechanism. Four edits on the rule instance: (a) version 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0; (b) tierState.activeTier 'working-model' -> 'automated'; (c) append working-model -> automated transition with evidenceClass citing D-COMMS-1; (d) append closure note to notes field with '| PROMOTED 2026-06-01:' separator. lifecycleStatus REMAINS working-model — promotion is on the tier axis only.
acceptanceCriteria: lifecycleStatus REMAINS 'working-model' (no change — tier axis promotion only)
transitions array length grows from 1 to 2
New transition has from='working-model', to='automated', evidenceClass citing D-COMMS-1 SHA f6bee1b9 + PR #84
notes field extended with '| PROMOTED 2026-06-01:' suffix matching prior-art pattern
Instance validates against rule.schema.json v1.2.0 (with allOf forbidden-audit-paint-names constraint)

outputs.description: Deliverable instance lifecycle — spec lands at S4-authored, transitions through S5-in-progress -> S6-staged -> S7-merged -> S8-closed across the dispatch.
acceptanceCriteria: mergeCommitSha populated with actual squash-merge SHA
transitions array captures full lifecycle path

preMerge: ajv validate of spec against deliverable.schema.json passes
ajv validate of edited rule instance against rule.schema.json v1.2.0 passes (with -r for allOf $ref)
postMerge: Slack channel #luhtech-agents-comms broadcasts the merge PR event

transitions.trigger: Spec authored against verified substrate tarball (rule.schema.json v1.2.0 + RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 current state + two canonical promotion prior-arts FU-D-2 and FU-D-3 + allOf definition). Canonical promotion mechanism confirmed consistent across both priors. D-COMMS-1 evidenceClass cited with full SHA + PR number.
Dispatch execution begun: canonical promotion edits applied to rule instance
Branch committed, PR opened, CI green (validate-instances + broadcast both pass)
Squash merge to main via MERGE PR 92
Post-merge: RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 at v1.1.0 automated; rules-at-automated count = 4

notes: Fourth rule promotion in foundation arc's post-completion. Pattern fully canonical now (FU-D-2 CI-UNSTABLE, FU-D-3 DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE, FU-D-4 PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK, this one). Pure data fix on a single rule instance — no source schema edits, no CI workflow authoring, no code changes. The CI substrate (slack-broadcast.yml + #luhtech-agents-comms channel) already exists on main from D-COMMS-1; this deliverable just records that the rule's automated tier is now operationally backed and flips the activeTier accordingly.
